privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Android layout refactoring task for the SocialApp project located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SocialApp. The layout file app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml contains four specific hardcoded dimension values (16dp, 24dp, 80dp, 14sp) that must be extracted into app/src/main/res/values/dimens.xml and overridden in app/src/main/res/values-sw600dp/dimens.xml for tablet support. The verifier checks that the layout is refactored to use @dimen references, the base dimens file contains at least 3 extracted dimensions, the tablet directory exists, tablet dimensions file is created, and tablet values are larger than base values. The metadata claim of 'expected_min_tablet_increment: 1.2' is not enforced by the verifier.
